content:
Traefik v3.7.6 (latest, released 2026-06-30 per github.com/traefik/traefik/releases; v2.11.51 is the v2 LTS line still receiving CVE backports, v3 is current stable). HTTP-01 cert config (doc.traefik.io v3.7): entryPoints web (:80) + websecure (:443); web has http.redirections.entryPoint.to=websecure scheme=https permanent=true (redirect is fully compatible with HTTP-01 challenge); certificatesResolvers..acme.{email, storage: acme.json, httpChallenge.entryPoint: web}. Per-subdomain certs are derived automatically from Host() matchers in router rules — each subdomain gets its own LE cert. Wildcard certs require DNS-01 (NOT used here). acme.json must be chmod 600 and on a persistent volume. Docker labels: traefik.enable=true, traefik.http.routers..rule=Host(`sub.luciel.dev`), .entrypoints=websecure, .tls.certresolver=, traefik.http.services..loadbalancer.server.port=

, traefik.docker.network=. Set providers.docker.exposedByDefault=false for security.
